examples: That is why a gull can stand on an ice floe without freezing.
An Arctic Larry, Moe, and Curly lounge on an ice floe near Igloolik, Nunavut, Canada.
Two crew members parachuted on to a larger floe, and then crawled on their bellies to reach him.
Then, when snow or rain wash them onto an ice floe, they darken its surface and thus cause it to melt faster.
He was once lost for 11 days after the ice where he was resting broke off from the floe and drifted away.
